name: Sonic 10 Years Later
description:
Time for a yap session

This is my first bot, and I probably shouldn’t have started with a multi-char bot. It has been hard to figure out how to add characters, events, and places for this, especially when I only have a few reference comics to work with. In my profile, I am aware it says that I will use my own art, but I am currently on vacation, and I do art on my PC. The art is by Nekotenshi on twitter, here is the link: https://x.com/2003Nekotenshi

Onto the bot.

Not everyone in the new generation on Nekotenshi’s page has a name, so I only included the ones that did. I aged them up, so I’m sorry if the math is wrong. The list composes of:

Asher the Cat

Zac the Hedgehog

Rayna the Hedgehog

Roxanne the Echidna

Scarlet the Bat

Maria the Hedgehog

Geo the Hedgehog

Elio the Hedgehog

Akura the Wraith

Those in relationships

Sonic and Amy (Married)

Shadow and Koko (Married)

Knuckles and Rouge (Married)

Blaze and Silver (Married)

Tails and Cream (Dating)

Tangle and Whisper (Dating)

Zac and Maria (Dating)

Specific details

I would not recommend dating any characters, and don’t even try to start a non-monogamous relationship, or steal one that is dating/married. This bot will be limited because you guys will try to be freaky with the characters, and that is a major red flag. If you want me to add a characters, I’ll do it, because currently those that are listed are the only characters. Eggman is also here, along with Sage, so don’t worry about that. All of the IDW diamond cutters are here too. Whether you wish to be an adult and hang out with the parents, or a “kid” and hang out with the other “kids” is up to you.

MESSAGE: This update is only to describe what is going on. No character updates unfortunately:(. I honestly have no idea what to do next. I’m thinking of starting a fantasy wizard school setting, but I’m too lazy to do my own art. I was thinking of doing another Sonic future bot, but with Blaze marrying Sonic and other relationships. I did this bit out of a spurt of inspiration, and I have yet to have another. If I do upload more bots, they will be erratic and not a consistent schedule. On the other hand, apparently there was another Sonic future bot by Aveerage_cookie_eater! We just beat him in messages! I have a bit of an arrogant goal to get to the front page when someone searches the Sonic tags, and I move up a page every day. I genuinely do not think this bot is that good bro, I for a first bot, I feel as if I should have done way worse, and I feel a bit of pressure to get another bot out that is better. Unfortunately, no inspiration. I will genuinely do any bot recommendation that is sfw, while also retaining to Sonic because I don’t want to move on and do my own art. If you are reading this long ahh addition to my yap session, I am sorry, but I respect the lack of dopamine from reading what some random guy on the internet is yapping about. Anyways, thanks for chatting, and I will (probably) try to get a bot out within a week or two!

!: Update 0.1: Updated character personalities that I didn’t like, as well as all of the older character appearances.

Update 0.2: Added Big the Cat, Froggy, and Vanilla. I don’t know why, but I accidentally made it to where G.U.N. wasn’t disbanded, it is now disbanded (I hope). Lore is not added yet, because there is so few comics. I will do some research and add to it later, most likely drawing from different fan comics. I updated personalities again, this time focusing on Cream and Tails, as well as Silver and Blaze. I focused more on Cream and Tails, because they are so cute together ❤️

Update 0.3: Added Team Chaotix! I also updated Rayna’s personality, as she was a bit cold and anylitical during recent testing. I don’t know why, but suddenly c
